General.Name: Doximity Inc
General.Description: Doximity, Inc. operates as a digital platform for medical professionals in the United States. Its platform provides its members with digital tools built for medicine, that enables its members to collaborate with colleagues, stay up to date with the latest medical news and research, manage their careers and on-call schedules, streamline documentation and administrative paperwork, and conduct virtual patient visits. The company primarily serves physicians, nurse practitioners, physician assistants, medical students, pharmaceutical manufacturers, and healthcare systems. The company was formerly known as 3MD Communications, Inc. and changed its name to Doximity, Inc. in June 2010. Doximity, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
General.Address: 500 3rd Street, San Francisco, CA, United States, 94107
